title: Mega Audino Battle Guide
summary: The only Mega built purely a[round] [support] — 103/126/126 bulk plus [Fairy] typing makes it the cleanest [wish] passer in Champions.
strengths: Symmetric 126 Def and 126 SpD tanks both physical and special hits
[wish] plus [heal-bell] turns it into a cycle hub for the whole team
weaknesses: [Steel] and [Poison] 2x weaknesses remain and get punished hard
60 Atk makes its threat ceiling almost nothing — [taunt] deletes it
Turn one before Mega Evolution leaves it without [healer]

recommendedMoves.reason: Required [Fairy] STAB so [Dark] and [Dragon] attackers cannot freely c[lick]
103 HP base makes the heal cover over half of most teammates

safely scouts moves and times windows

bodyMarkdown:
## Overview
Mega Audino is the oddball Mega — the only one built entirely a[round] keeping the team alive rather than pressuring the opponent. Adding [Fairy] on top of [Normal] gives it perfect matchups into [Dark] and [Dragon], and the 126/126 defensive split means you don't have to guess which side of the oppo[sing] attacker will hit. It plays as a pure cycle hub.

## Strengths
The 103/126/126 defensive profile eats one hit from nearly every special attacker in the format and holds up on the physical side too. [Fairy] typing blanks Hydreigon's [draco-meteor], any [Dark] pivot's [dark-pulse], and [Fighting] attackers trying to pick off [support] mons. [dazzling-gleam] is weak on paper but still a real threat off 80 SpA into [Dark]-types. The real payoff is [wish] — 103 HP base means the healed amount covers over half of most teammates, and [heal-bell] on top of it deletes entire status-based plans in a [sing]le turn.

## Weaknesses & Answers
[Steel] and [Poison] both hit for 2x and the format has real pressure on both axes — a [flash-cannon] spam attacker or an [adaptability] poison STAB will chase it out. With only 60 Atk the threat ceiling is basically zero, so [taunt] permanently shuts it down. And because the turn-one ability before Mega Evolution isn't [healer], anything that KOs on the entry turn still works. Oppo[sing] stall teams that grind [wish] PP also break it eventually.

## Recommended Moveset
The one offensive slot is [dazzling-gleam] — enough to chunk [Dragon]s and force [Dark] pivots out, not enough to sweep. [wish] is the core utility: every teammate behind Mega Audino is effectively running leftovers on demand. [heal-bell] is the second [support] slot, and it lets Mega Audino cure [toxic], burn, or sleep stacked on a setup sweeper for free. [protect] is the fourth slot because it safely times [wish], scouts Choice-locked moves, and buys a turn for teammate switch-ins. If the team needs more offensive presence, [hyper-voice] replaces [dazzling-gleam] to punch through [substitute].

## Item · Ability · Tera
The item has to be [audinite], no alternative exists. Post-Mega the ability locks to [healer], which adds a probabilistic cleanse of adjacent ally status in doubles-flavored play. For Tera, [Steel] is the first pick because it covers the [Poison] weakness, adds a [Fairy]-[Steel] resistance shell, and keeps the [Dragon] resistance intact. Tera [Water] is the backup when the team is weak to [Fire] and [Ground]. Tera [Fairy] is skippable — [dazzling-gleam] off 80 SpA still doesn't hurt anyone worth the Tera.

## Teammates & Synergy
Mega Audino wants setup sweepers that [normal]ly burn HP to function — [dragon-dance] [Dragon]s, [swords-dance] [Fighting] mons, [calm]-mind [wall]s. A [wish] from Mega Audino lets those partners come back full HP repeatedly. The team also needs a [Steel] resist ([Ground] tanks or [Fire] pivots) and something with [prankster] or fast [taunt] to answer oppo[sing] setup that Mega Audino can't interrupt. A hazard remover behind it makes the [wish] cycle efficient.

## Play Patterns
C[lick] Mega Evolution on the entry turn every time — the raw turn-one bulk matters more than scouting. Time [wish] so the heal lands the turn after a teammate switches in, not while Mega Audino itself is under pressure. Save [heal-bell] for when the opponent has stacked at least two status ailments on your team; any earlier and the PP is wasted. Never try to stay in against [Steel] or [Poison] attackers — pivot out and come back later in the game for a second [wish] cycle.
